notable_phrases: record quarter driven by continued strength of Microsoft Cloud, which surpassed $42 billion in revenue
the real outperformance in Azure this quarter was in our non-AI business
summary: Microsoft reported a record quarter with strong cloud and AI growth, though management acknowledged data center capacity constraints and emphasized efficiency gains across the AI stack while expressing confidence in sustained demand despite macro uncertainty.
